narrative:
Liberty Township has 1,504 registered voters, with 48.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 42.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 32.8 percentage points.
